title: Visitor Token Pass
short_description: A personalized digital identity that connects each visitor to your experience. It links interactions, content, and moments across physical and digital touchpoints.
long_description: A flexible digital pass that assigns each visitor a unique token, enabling seamless identification, personalization, and data continuity throughout the experience. Whether accessed via QR code, NFC wristband, RFID card, or tagged object, it connects people to content, games, media, and rewards while tracking interactions in real time. The foundation for connected visitor journeys across spaces and moments.
visuals: Hero visual – Visitor Token Pass in use within a branded environment
Interface mockup – primary interaction flow for Visitor Token Pass
System overview – how visitors, screen, and backend connect

items.title: Visual identity
items.description: Colours, fonts, screen assets, motion language, and tone can be adapted to brand or event theme.

items.title: Participation metrics
items.description: Starts, active users, completion rate, repeat plays, or dwell time depending on module behaviour.

items.title: Behaviour signals

items.title: Needs a clearer participation hook

items.title: Engagement should be measurable
